verdict: A solid and physically comfortable chart with clean lane-alternation flow, but it suffers from a premature drop in energy during the second drop section.

issues.problem: Drop 2 abruptly loses energy, shifting from engaging eighth-note streams to sparse quarter-note taps, which deflates the climax.
The transition into the outro lacks contrast because it maintains the exact same quarter-note density as the preceding section, making the song's exit feel flat.
